title: rhododendron angulatum
intro: Rhododendron angulatum, also known as the Himalayan rose, is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron angulatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, coughs, and skin infections.
